creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This was an issue upgrading from 2.2 to 2.2.1; kdeconfig was subsequently 
rewritten and people should no longer see this problem.  However, here's 
a workaround if you get this error: 

rm ~/.DCOP* then rm the two socket files in ~/.kde/ and 
then check that there's no socket files hanging about in /tmp
